description: The RMM system generates a critical alert that a client's primary file server is offline.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the P1 alert in the monitoring system.

expected_outcome.value: A technician takes ownership of the alert.

nodes.task_description: Attempt to connect to the server's remote management interface (e.g., iDRAC, iLO).

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the server's hardware interface is also unresponsive, indicating a hardware or power issue.

nodes.task_description: Escalate the issue to the data center provider to perform a physical check on the server.

expected_outcome.value: The data center provider is engaged to investigate the physical hardware.
